contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Fix halted daily buy-back provision pipeline (Wix decoupling)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/378
  
  Details:
  Fixed the halted [DAILY BUYBACK PROVISION] pipeline in the TrueSight DAO main ledger.
  
  Problem: Daily buy-back provision rows stopped appearing in the "offchain transactions" sheet after 2026-06-16. Root cause: getDailyTdgBuyBackBudget() fetched the budget from a retired Wix data item; the frozen/failed fetch made createDailyTdgBuyBackTransactions() silently return false, writing no provisions.
  
  Fix (merged in PR #378):
  - getDailyTdgBuyBackBudget() now computes the budget locally using the same formula syncAllPerformanceStatistics() uses: (past 30d sales / 30) * min(assetPerTdg, 1 - treasuryYield/100).
  - Removed the dead getAssetPerIssuedTdgBalanceOnWix() call from the sync budget block.
  - Fixed update_buy_back_reserve_cache.py to read the reserve from column B (balance) to match the GAS getBuyBackReserveFromOffChainBalance() reader (was reading column D, drifted to $39.86 vs correct $46.86).
  - Removed stray duplicate Code.js that would break clasp push.
  
  Deploy + data:
  - Pushed to GAS project 1ZQjgSZv and redeployed the 3 page-facing deployments (@19/@20/@21). Triggered sync: status ok, updated 9, errors 0.
  - Backfilled the 23 missing days (2026-06-17 to 2026-07-09, $5.74 total), recomputing each day's budget from trailing-30d revenue (reconstruction matched live F1 exactly).
  - BUY_BACK_RESERVE now $46.86; homepage stat card and detail page corrected.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/378
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, DeepSeek
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
